rows.label: tlk43320242_04_msg0002
rows.name:
I've never been to Temperantia,
so I don't know if this is true,
but...

rows.label: tlk43320242_04_msg0003
rows.name:
I heard a tyrannical Divine Beast
called Kurodil is sealed away
over there.

rows.label: tlk43320242_04_msg0004
rows.name:
About 300 years ago, a coupla
hundred Ice-type Blades teamed up
and put the seal on him, they say.

rows.label: tlk43320242_04_msg0005
rows.name:
I heard there are many other
dangerous monsters over there.

rows.label: tlk43320242_04_msg0006
rows.name:
There's no people living
there. It's a desolate place.

rows.label: tlk43320242_04_msg0007
rows.name:
Probably 'cos of all the
monsters, I'll bet.
